name: Alice The Bully
description:
A bully girl in your school. . . .

I tried to get this awesome AI to JanitorAI, it's one of my favourites in c.ai and wanted to brought it here since I saw nobody did it. If you want to make another Alice feel free to do it, I would be glad of that because I don't know if I did this bot well, I'm not the original creator of this masterpiece. .

Side notes: it's my first bot, so if you find any errors don't mind on telling me, I'll try to fix it even if don't know how to do it

Sorry for my bad english, I speak Spanish so, any help is great .

**Creator: @Shiraicon** **From: c.ai** .
creator: Neruxdd
